name: CreditZen Solutions
description_short: CreditZen offers credit repair and business financing services, claiming to have removed 4,000+ negative items and secured $30M in financing since 2018.
description_long:
CreditZen Solutions positions itself as a hybrid credit repair and business financing firm operating since at least 2018. The company claims 15+ years of expertise and advertises a track record of removing over 4,000 negative items from client credit reports while securing $30 million in business financing. Their primary service model combines credit repair with downstream business lending, suggesting credit improvement leads to financing opportunities.

The company offers a broad service portfolio spanning credit repair (dispute and removal of negative items), business financing, SBA loans, equipment financing, real estate loans and lines of credit, business credit cards marketed at 0% interest, and credit card processing. Their credit repair process follows a stated 5-step model: free consultation, credit report analysis, dispute filing with pricing quoted based on item count, financial planning during the 60-day repair window, and financing qualification once credit scores reach 700+. They also offer a tax savings program (Simerp) and business credit services.

CreditZen emphasizes competitive rates, fast processing (claiming 3-day financing approval in one testimonial), and a 60-day credit repair program without extended monthly payment plans. They highlight biweekly file updates and transparency as differentiators. The website features client testimonials regarding home purchases, credit score improvements, and rapid business financing.

Key caveats exist: The website makes aggressive claims ("lowest rates," "quick" results) without substantiation, provides no fee structure transparency despite quoting prices based on dispute volume, and no independent verification of the 4,000-item or $30M claims is possible. The 60-day turnaround for credit repair is stated as fact but depends entirely on creditor and credit bureau responsiveness. No regulatory licenses, certifications, or complaints data are mentioned. The hybrid model conflates credit repair (a service) with financing (a separate lending product), which may create unrealistic expectations about credit repair leading to guaranteed lending approval.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Advertises a 60-day credit repair program with no extended monthly payment plans (vs. typical 24-month commitments)
Claims removal of 4,000+ negative items and $30M in secured financing since 2018
Offers biweekly file updates and claims full transparency throughout the repair process
Provides free initial consultation and credit report analysis with no upfront commitment
Integrates business financing options post-credit repair rather than referring clients elsewhere
Multiple service offerings (credit repair, SBA loans, equipment financing, real estate loans, business credit cards) under one company
cons: No fee schedule disclosed on website; pricing quoted individually based on dispute count, making cost comparison impossible
Claims of 'lowest rates' and 'quick' approval (3 days) are unsubstantiated and depend on lender/bureau responsiveness
No regulatory licensing, certifications, or complaint history provided; difficult to verify credentials or track record independently
Website testimonials are brief and unverified; repeated testimonial (Frank Giuna) appears twice, suggesting limited or recycled feedback
Conflates credit repair (disputing errors) with business financing (lending), potentially creating false expectations that credit improvement guarantees financing approval
best_for: Small business owners seeking both credit repair and downstream business financing in a single relationship
Entrepreneurs with credit report errors who want to improve scores before applying for SBA loans or equipment financing
Business owners looking for faster credit repair than traditional 24-month payment plans allow
Companies needing multiple financing products (lines of credit, equipment loans, business credit cards) bundled with credit cleanup
diagnosis: CreditZen is best for small business owners who need credit repair combined with business financing and want to consolidate these services with one provider. The main caveat is that credit repair claims are unsubstantiated, fee transparency is absent, and there is no independent verification of their stated track record or ability to deliver results within stated timelines.
services: Credit repair and negative item dispute filing
Business financing and small business loans
SBA loan assistance and application support
Real estate loans and lines of credit
Business credit cards marketed at 0% interest
Biweekly progress updates during credit repair
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
